label: Mountain Loop
stresses: alpine closed loop, high relief — dense contours, hillshade, big elevation stats

label: Flat Marathon
stresses: flat urban closed loop, low relief — sparse contours, distance/duration-driven footer

label: Thru-Hike
stresses: long point-to-point linear route — elongated bbox, start far from finish, >80 km with sustained elevation

label: Place Only
stresses: place with no route line and zeroed distance/elevation stats — exercises the data contract's place-only slot dropping
